title: Jassar
content:

{{Quote|The pup died trying to defend you. An honorable death. Though, he would have died in any case.|Darth Kruhl, to Rikkar-Du|<ref name="Legacy 13" />}}
The [[Codru-Ji]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] '''Jassar''' was the [[Reproduction/Legends|son]] of [[Rikkar-Du's clan|clan]] [[Chief/Legends|chief]] [[Rikkar-Du]] and a woman named [[Tassa]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Munto Codru/Legends|Munto Codru]]. He was still in his [[Species/Legends|species]]' [[Youngling/Legends|juvenile]] [[wyrwulf]] form in the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[137 ABY]], when the [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Darth Kruhl]] came to Munto Codru and requested that an [[Darth Krayt's Galactic Empire|Imperial]] base be built on the world. Rikkar-Du's defiance of the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] resulted in his entire family being targeted for [[Death/Legends|death]], and Jassar was [[Assassination on Munto Codru|slain]] by Kruhl while trying to defend his [[Parent/Legends|father]] from the Sith [[Lord/Legends|Lord's]] [[Sith lightsaber/Legends|blade]].

==Biography==
{{Quote|Jassar! Why didn't you stay with your mother? Oh, Jassar…!|Rikkar-Du, following Jassar's death|<ref name="Legacy 13" />}}
[[File:Jassar_and_Darth_Kruhl.jpg|thumb|left|220px|Jassar attacks Darth Kruhl in defense of his father.]]
Jassar was a [[Codru-Ji]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who lived on his [[Species/Legends|species]]' [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of [[Munto Codru/Legends|Munto Codru]]. The [[Reproduction/Legends|son]] of [[Rikkar-Du's clan|clan]] [[Chief/Legends|chief]] [[Rikkar-Du]] and [[Tassa]], who was herself the daughter of another [[Tassa's clan|clan]] [[Tassa's father|chief]], Jassar was still in the Codru-Ji [[Youngling/Legends|juvenile]] [[wyrwulf]] form in the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[137 ABY]].<ref name="Legacy 13" /> As a hexapedal [[Canine/Legends|canine]], he would pupate in a cocoon upon reaching puberty, before emerging as a bipedal, [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]] adult.<ref name="LECG">''[[Legacy Era Campaign Guide]]''</ref>

The year 137 ABY saw [[Darth Kruhl]], a [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] of the [[One Sith]] and [[Darth Krayt's Galactic Empire]], approach Jassar's [[Parent/Legends|father]] and request that an Imperial base be built on Munto Codru. In exchange, he would help install Rikkar-Du as leader of all of the [[Planet/Legends|world's]] clans. Instead, Rikkar-Du [[Codru-Ji clan leader meeting|informed]] a group of other clan chiefs of Kruhl's plans and proposed that they unite in order to oppose the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]]–Imperials. Jassar and Tassa met him outside of a [[Temple (Munto Codru)|temple]] afterward, where Tassa's support for her husband led to a romantic moment. Rikkar-Du resisted kissing his [[Marriage/Legends|wife]], however, so as not to embarrass Jassar, and told her to take their son back to their [[Tent/Legends|tent]] at [[Rikkar-Du's camp|camp]] while he gathered his thoughts inside the temple.<ref name="Legacy 13" />

After arriving home, Jassar decided he wanted to be with his father<ref name="CSWE Tassa">{{CSWECite|III|223|Tassa}}</ref> and left to join him in [[Meditation/Legends|meditation]].<ref name="CSWE Jassar">{{CSWECite|II|141|Jassar}}</ref> After Jassar's departure, Tassa was visited at home by [[Kassek-Ka]], a [[Kassek-Ka's clan|clan]] chief who had secretly promised [[Darth/Legends|Darth]] Kruhl to [[Death/Legends|eliminate]] Rikkar-Du if he ended up opposing the Sith.<ref name="CSWE Tassa" /> Rikkar-Du's entire family had become targets of Kruhl following the clan chief's defiance, and Kassek-Ka killed Tassa. Meanwhile, Jassar entered the temple and found Kruhl about to [[Assassination on Munto Codru|kill]] Rikkar-Du with a [[Sith lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]]. The wyrwulf attacked the Sith, and Kruhl slew Jassar in front of his father's [[Eye/Legends|eyes]] before striking down Rikkar-Du.<ref name="Legacy 13" />

==Personality and traits==
{{Dialogue|Tassa|You have no romance in you at all, husband. Just shut up a moment and kiss me!|Jassar|Wurrrf!|Rikkar-Du|Sorry, Tassa—it seems we're in danger of embarrassing our son! Perhaps it's best you take ''Jassar'' back to camp.|attr=Jassar interrupts a tender moment between his parents|src=<ref name="Legacy 13" />}}
Jassar was a [[Color/Legends|brown]]-[[Hair/Legends|furred]] wyrwulf who, by 137 ABY, had not yet developed the ability to [[Language/Legends|speak]] beyond barks and growls. He became embarrassed by an impending kiss between his parents,<ref name="Legacy 13" /> but soon thereafter he hoped to join his father in meditation.<ref name="CSWE Jassar" /> Jassar attacked Darth Kruhl in an effort to protect Rikkar-Du from the Sith [[Lord/Legends|Lord]],<ref name="Legacy 13" /> and, although he was strong, the wyrwulf was no match for Kruhl's [[Force-sensitive/Legends|command]] of the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side of the Force]].<ref name="CSWE Jassar" /> Kruhl believed that Jassar's death had been an honorable one.<ref name="Legacy 13" />

==Behind the scenes==
Jassar first appeared in the [[Legacy (2006) 13|thirteenth issue]] of the [[Star Wars comic books|comic series]] ''[[Star Wars: Legacy]]'', which was released by [[Dark Horse Comics]]<ref name="Legacy 13" /> on [[June 13]], [[2007]].<ref name="Marvel">{{Marvel|url=comics/issue/54385/star_wars_legacy_2006_13|text=Star Wars: Legacy (2006) #13}}</ref> The issue was written by [[John Ostrander]] and [[Jan Duursema]], and pencilled by [[Colin Wilson (artist)|Colin Wilson]].<ref name="Legacy 13" />
